photographer.name: Jane Doe
photographer.bio: I'm a professional photographer based in San Francisco. With over a decade of experience, I specialize in wedding, portrait, and event photography. My approach is candid, creative, and always focused on telling your unique story through my lens.

services.title: Wedding Photography
services.description: Capturing your special day from beginning to end. Every laugh, tear, and dance move documented beautifully.

services.title: Portrait Sessions
services.description: Professional portraits for individuals, families, and couples. Studio or location — your choice.

services.title: Event Photography
services.description: Corporate events, parties, and special occasions. Discrete, professional coverage for any event size.

services.title: Landscape & Travel
services.description: Stunning landscapes and travel photography for brands, publications, and personal projects.

testimonials.name: Sarah & Mike
testimonials.text: Jane captured our wedding perfectly. Every photo tells a story. We couldn't be happier with the results.

testimonials.name: David Chen
testimonials.text: Professional, creative, and incredibly easy to work with. The portraits exceeded my expectations.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.text: The event photos were stunning. Jane has an incredible eye for detail and captured moments we didn't even notice.
